utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am telling you man , I saw it .

utterances.text: Yeah , well , you are wrong ! Okay , you are wrong .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am not wrong ! I wish I was . I am sorry . Bet that barium enema does not sound so bad now , huh ?
